title: SkyeNet Clockworks
description: Create: Clockwork focused Modpack for skyemc.com server!
body:
## SkyeNet: Clockworks **Minecraft 1.20.1 | Fabric** A Create based modpack built around **Create: Clockwork**, **Create Crafts & Additions**, and other Create expansions. Designed for players who love engineering, automation, and building massive machines together. ### ⚙️ Core Features - **Create & Clockwork Expansion** – Build complex factories, airships, and contraptions. - **CC: Tweaked + Peripheral Works** – Automate Create setups with computers and peripherals. - **Valkyrien Skies 2** – Fly your creations and explore the skies with physics-based builds. ### 🌍 Explore & Adventure - **YUNG’s Mods**, **End Remastered**, **Creeper/Enderman Overhaul** – Fresh worldgen, structures, and bosses. - **Farmer’s Delight + Expanded Delight** – Upgrade your farms, cooking, and food variety. ### 🧰 Quality of Life - **AppleSkin, Mod Menu, Not Enough Crashes** – Clean, stable, easy gameplay. - **Iris + Sodium + Lithium** – Optimized performance and visuals. - **Simple Voice Chat** – Talk and work with other players seamlessly. ### 💬 Community Join the **Skyemc.net** server, meet new players, and share your creations. Build amazing factories, flying bases, or cozy workshops together. **Server IP:** `modded.skyemc.net`
